A1810 raw data
Molecular dynamics simulation trajectories of kinesin motor domain exposed to electric field and the starting structure (system.gro). 
List of the files
system.gro – the initial structure of the system
 
Trajectories, kinesin recentered
trajectories with no electric field applied
NOFIELD-traj_1_cent.xtc
NOFIELD-traj_2_cent.xtc
NOFIELD-traj_3_cent.xtc

X-traj_1_cent.xtc
X-traj_2_cent.xtc
X-traj_3_cent.xtc
trajectories with 100 MV/m electric field in -X direction
Xrev-traj_1_cent.xtc 
Xrev-traj_2_cent.xtc
Xrev-traj_3_cent.xtc
trajectories with 100 MV/m electric field in Y direction
Y-traj_1_cent.xtc
Y-traj_2_cent.xtc
Y-traj_3_cent.xtc
trajectories with 100 MV/m electric field in -Y direction
Yrev-traj_1_cent.xtc
